raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un nu taweem divi Deh-
eem/ kas Egiptes-Semmê dsim-
nufchi/ pirms ka es pee tew ef-
nu uhs Egipti nahzis / teem
uhs manneem buht: Gewrâims/
n Manaffne buhs man ta patt/
i Ruhbens/ un Sihmeans.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Bet taws Nads/ kas tew
ehz winneem dsims/ tew pee-
errehs/ teem buhs pehz tawo
rahtu Wahrdü nofaukteem
apt/eeftch fawas eemantojamäs
eeſas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Kad es nu no Mesopotami-
s nahzu/ tad irr Raële pee man
omirruft eeftch Kanâana-Semi-
es us Zettu/ weenu Semmes-
irsumu no Gewratas/ un es
prakfn winnu tur Gewratas
ett-Mallâ/ un fchi irr Betleme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un Israëls eraudfija Jah-
pa Dehlus / un fazzija : Kam
hee irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un Jahseps fazzija us fa-
u Tehwu: Tee irr manni Dehli/
man Deews fscheit Dewis irr.
n wiꞥſch fazzija : peewedd jelle
hs pee man/ka es tohs frehtiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Bet Israëta Azzis bija
mtigas noWezzuma/un wiꞥſch
e warreja redſeht / un tas pee-
edde tohs pee winna/ un wiꞥſch
kuhpſtija tohs / un apkampe
tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un Israëts fazzija us Jah-
fevu: es ne buhtu fschittis tawu
Waigu redſeht/betraugi/ Deeivs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un Jahseps nozechle tohs
no fawa Klehpja / un lohzijahs ar
fawu Waigu pee Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un Jahseps nehme tohs
abbejus/ Eewraimu ar fawu lab-
bu Rohku / prett Israëta kreifas
Rohkas / un Manaffu ar fawu
kreifn Rohku / prett Israëta lab-
bas Rohkas/ un wiꞥſch likke tohs
pee winna no-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un Israëls issteepc fawu
labbo Rohku / un likke to us Ee-
wräima Galwu/ jepschu tas tas
Masalnjs bija / un fawu kreifn
Rohku / us Manaffus Galwu/
wiꞥſch ar Sirxu ta likke fawas
Rohkas / jepschu Manaffus tas
Purmdsuntajs bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un wiꞥſch frehtija Jahse-
pu un fazzija : tas Deews /
preeſch furra Waigu manni Teh-
wi Ahbraäms un Jhsaïks irr stai-
gajſchi / tas Deews / kas manu
fawu Muhschu lihdſchodeen irr*
barrojis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Tas Engelis/ kas mann
pestijis irr no weiffa Zauna / taë
laid swehti fchohs Puisenus/ fo
eekſch teem nofaukts tohp / mane
Wahrdß/ un manno Tehwu Ah-
bräima/un Jhsaäka Wahrdß/ un
ka tee pa Pulkeein wairojahs tahë
Semmes widdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Un Jahseps redſeja / ka
winna Tehws fatvn labbu Roh-
fu us Eewräima Galwu likke/ tai
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
